arts.sum: Manchester United supporters have been having their say on Ruben Amorim - and his start as head coach - after their midweek defeat to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Agent throws a strop and now considering agreeing big move to Manchester United
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies’ agent Nick Househ has been left angry by Bayern Munich’s attitude during contract negotiations, so now wants to listen to offers from Manchester United and Real Madrid. That’s according to journalist Christian Falk, who says Manchester United may not be as far out of the picture for Davies as it appeared. A report The post Agent throws a strop and now considering agreeing big move to Manchester United appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: BBC to show Man City v Salford & Arsenal v Man Utd in FA Cup
arts.sum: The BBC will show the FA Cup third-round games between Manchester City and Salford City and Arsenal and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes telling admission on Man Utd expectations after Arsenal reality check
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's unbeaten start to life as Manchester United manager was brought to an abrupt end on Wednesday night when Arsenal beat the Red Devils 2-0 at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Man United January transfer priority 'revealed' but deal for leading target 'is on hold'
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim allegedly wants to bring a new forward to Old Trafford as early as the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd FLOP given escape route as Championship club approach
arts.sum: The Turkish international has struggled for game time at Old Trafford since joining the Premier League club in the summer of 2023, and a move could be on the horizon in the upcoming transfer window. Championship side Hull City are reportedly interested in Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir .

arts.ttl: Every word of Ruben Amorim pre Forest press conference on 6 Dec
arts.sum: Do you feel the improvement has not been translated into positions in the table yet or results? If you see nowadays, in one week, we have three games and it can change the image of the team, the perception of the team.
